# UC-10.17.8 · SonicWall Botnet Filter Command-and-Control Blocks (SonicWall)

## Description

Botnet IP feeds block C2 callbacks at line rate. Volume spikes often align with compromised endpoints phoning home.

## Value

Shortens containment windows by highlighting internal hosts with repeated botnet hits.

## Implementation

Confirm botnet database updates are logged. Enrich internal src_ip with asset owner.

## SPL

```spl
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)botnet")
| stats count by src_ip, dst_ip, cat
| where count>=10
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Timechart (block rate), table (src_ip, botnet IP, rule).

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
